steps.sql:
SELECT name 
    FROM mytext 
    ORDER BY name COLLATE reverse

SELECT name 
    FROM (SELECT name FROM mytext)  
    ORDER BY name COLLATE reverse

CREATE TABLE mytext2(name COLLATE reverse);
    INSERT INTO mytext2 SELECT name FROM mytext;

SELECT name 
    FROM (SELECT name FROM mytext2)  
    ORDER BY name

SELECT name 
    FROM (SELECT name FROM mytext2)
    ORDER BY name COLLATE usual
